commands.repair_reason: - Protected maintainer-authored PR with no actionable review findings should stay in normal maintainer review rather than cleanup or repair automation.; Cleared: The diff only changes device pairing request reconciliation and a colocated regression test; it does not add dependencies, scripts, workflow permissions, secret handling, or new external code execution. commands.review_summary:
The PR changes device pairing so a subset reconnect refreshes one already-covering pending request in place while broader-scope escalations still mint a replacement request id.

PR surface: Source +43, Tests +52. Total +95 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main refreshes only exact pending snapshots, and the shared reconciler deletes/replaces non-refreshable pending requests, so a subset reconnect can invalidate the id the owner copied. I did not run tests because this cleanup review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - Protected maintainer-authored PR with no actionable review findings should stay in normal maintainer review rather than cleanup or repair automation.
